# Summaries API

AI-generated summaries with key terms, powered by Claude or Ollama.

## Endpoints

### `POST /api/documents/{id}/summarize`
Generate a summary for a document using the active AI provider.

### `GET /api/documents/{id}/summaries`
Returns all summaries for a document.

### `GET /api/summaries/{id}`
Returns a single summary.

### `DELETE /api/summaries/{id}`
Delete a summary.

## Source Code
```{eval-rst}
.. automodule:: backend.api.summaries
   :members:
```
